designSystem.style: Clean information-dense card layout with vibrant sky-blue accent, urgency-coded color indicators, and adaptive brief density. Light mode features crisp whites with cyan-blue highlights; dark mode uses deep navy surfaces with electric blue accents for a premium editorial feel.

screens: Home / Briefs — Adaptive news feed with context selector (Commute, Work, Travel), brief length toggle (2/5/10 min), urgency-coded cards, and inline brief detail with source trail
Impact Lens — Role-based news rewriting (Commuter, Parent, Renter, Freelancer, Traveler) showing plain-language consequences for each story
Neighborhood Pulse — Visual map with pinned local alerts, zone selector (Your Block, Mission, Civic Center, Weather), and real-time local updates
Smart Alerts — Context-based notification feed with per-category toggles (Transit, Weather, Civic, Finance) and priority alert highlighting
Settings — Profile & role management, appearance toggle (light/dark with animated switch), coverage area config, and calendar integration status
